name: Retrieval-only (BM25 / Dense / Hybrid) — rebuilt corpus
description: Retrieval+reranking only (no LLM, no NLI) over the rebuilt corpus (2697 docs / 24481 chunks) with the 194-query depurated eval set. Replicates exp8 retrieval config (RAGPipeline.query steps 2-3).
hypothesis: Hybrid >= Dense >= BM25 on cross-encoder-oracle metrics.
